title: Seller uploaded videos | Seller Center
notes: Sellers can add videos to listings to bring products to life. Videos appear after the first image in the gallery on mobile apps. Supports product demonstrations, instructions, and behind-the-scenes content.

title: Prohibited and restricted items - overview
notes: Comprehensive list of items that cannot be sold on eBay, including firearms, drugs, counterfeit items, and other prohibited categories. Sellers receive email notifications if listings are removed for policy violations.

title: Promoted Listings Advanced | Seller Center
notes: Cost-per-click advertising with priority access to ad placements. Now branded as the 'priority campaign strategy' under Promoted Listings. Sellers only pay for clicks with advanced targeting controls.

title: Promoted Listings | Seller Center
notes: Campaign dashboard provides detailed listing-level performance metrics including impressions, clicks, sold items, CTR, and sales conversion rate. Accessible via Seller Hub.

title: Promoted Listings Express | Seller Center
notes: Flexible campaign options with general and priority strategies. General strategy pays when item sells after click; priority strategy pays per click with advanced targeting.

title: Promoted Listings Standard | Seller Center
notes: Cost-per-sale campaign strategy with general access to ad placements. Available to Above Standard and Top Rated sellers. Ad rate charged only when buyer clicks and purchases within 30 days.

title: Promoted Listings Standard | Seller Center
notes: Cost-per-sale campaign strategy with general access to ad placements. Available to Above Standard and Top Rated sellers. Ad rate charged only when buyer clicks and purchases within 30 days.

title: Promoted Offsite | Seller Center
notes: Dynamic cost-per-click advertising solution that increases traffic with ads on external channels like Google. Includes Halo sales tracking for related item purchases within 30 days of click.

title: Promoted Stores | Seller Center
notes: Advertising solution that highlights store coupons or categories in high visibility placements including above search results. Features store name, logo, and top performing listings.

title: Promoted Stores | Seller Center
notes: Allows sellers to select up to 1,000 listings with 10 featured items, and choose custom landing pages for store ads. Provides manual control over ad content and landing page destinations.

title: Promoted Stores | Seller Center
notes: Advertising solution that highlights store coupons or categories in high visibility placements including above search results. Features store name, logo, and top performing listings.

title: Seller Hub Discounts | Seller Center
notes: Sellers can create discount codes for buyers through Seller Hub Discounts. Codes can be shared privately or publicly on social media. eBay also runs periodic promotional code campaigns for buyers.

title: Send an offer and get 50% off final value fees | eBay.com
notes: eBay offers promotional credits for final value fees, Promoted Listings, and buyer coupons. Credits typically processed within 60 days and cannot exceed actual fees charged.

title: All about bidding | eBay
notes: Automatic bidding system where buyers enter maximum bid amount and eBay automatically raises bids in small increments to maintain high bid position. Maximum bid remains confidential.

title: Advanced search | eBay
notes: Stores 7 years of order information in My eBay. Provides access to return items, pay for purchases, and view order details. Central hub for managing all past purchases.

title: Buying limits and restrictions | eBay
notes: Account blocks limiting purchase ability, placed by sellers or eBay. Includes gift card limits ($1000/day, $1500/month) and Spendable funds limits ($2000/transaction, $5000/30 days).

title: eBay Buyer Protection | eBay.com
notes: Includes Money Back Guarantee, Vehicle Purchase Protection (up to $100k), and Business Equipment Purchase Protection. Covers non-delivery and items not as described at no extra charge.

title: How to Enable eBay App Notifications | eBay.com
notes: Real-time notifications for orders, offers, auctions, saved searches, and eBay Live events. Available via app, email, or SMS. Used for two-factor authentication on iOS and Android.

title: INVENTORY ONBOARDING GUIDE | eBay.com
notes: Field specifying number of items available for each trait combination in listings. Used in variation listings with multiple options like colors or sizes.

title: Selling limits | eBay
notes: Monthly limits on number of listings and total value to help sellers grow business manageably. Reviewed and adjusted monthly based on sales volume and feedback. Category-specific limits may apply.

title: Multi-quantity listings and listings with variations | eBay
notes: Interface for buyers to select quantity when purchasing. Sellers can toggle quantity display preferences to show exact number of items left. Supports volume pricing for tiered discounts.

title: How to use the quick listing tool
notes: Available on eBay.com and mobile app. Allows saving up to 250 drafts (compared to 5,000 in Seller Hub bulk tools). Simplified listing creation for sellers with 25-100 items.

title: How to use the quick listing tool
notes: Available on eBay.com and mobile app. Allows saving up to 250 drafts (compared to 5,000 in Seller Hub bulk tools). Simplified listing creation for sellers with 25-100 items.

title: How to Enable eBay App Notifications | eBay.com
notes: Push notifications providing real-time updates on orders, offers, auctions, price changes, and delivery steps. Available through eBay app, email, or SMS with customizable preferences.

title: Track/Confirm Delivery
notes: Track delivery status through My eBay for USPS and UPS packages. eBay Labels provides free automatic tracking with no manual entry needed. International shipments include dual tracking numbers.

title: Your recently viewed items | eBay
notes: Feature tracking items browsed while signed in. Accessible from My eBay, homepage, or search results. Users can clear all viewed items but cannot delete individual items.

title: Your recently viewed items | eBay
notes: Feature tracking items browsed while signed in. Accessible from My eBay, homepage, or search results. Users can clear all viewed items but cannot delete individual items.

title: How to use search | eBay
notes: Filtering options to narrow search by item specifics, condition, buying format, and seller policies. Mobile users tap 'Refine' button; desktop users see filters on left side. Includes AI-powered eBay.ai search.

title: eBay Returns
notes: Sellers typically issue refunds within 5-6 business days. eBay automatically issues refunds after 2 business days from delivery confirmation if seller hasn't acted. Refunds go to original payment method.

title: Relisting items | eBay
notes: Automatic or manual relisting of unsold items. Auto-relist up to 8 times for auctions 5+ days. Manual relist via My eBay or Seller Hub. Previously promoted items inherit promotion settings when relisted.

title: Relisting items | eBay
notes: Automatic or manual relisting of unsold items. Auto-relist up to 8 times for auctions 5+ days. Manual relist via My eBay or Seller Hub. Previously promoted items inherit promotion settings when relisted.

title: Viewing and responding to feedback from buyers | eBay
notes: Sellers can reply once to each feedback comment from their feedback profile. Reply appears below initial comment. Cannot edit or retract replies. Search limited to last 12 months.

title: Report an issue with a buyer | eBay
notes: Sellers can report buyers from Orders list by choosing 'Leave feedback' dropdown and selecting 'Report buyer'. Used for policy violations, false claims, and abusive buyer behavior.

title: Security Center - Report a Concern | eBay.com
notes: Link at bottom of every listing to report counterfeit items, stolen items, or suspected fraud. Form submission to eBay Security Center for policy violations.

title: Viewing and changing feedback left for sellers | eBay
notes: Sellers can send limited number of requests for buyers to revise negative/neutral feedback to positive. Buyers have 10 days to respond. Original comments hidden when revised.

title: Return an item for a refund | eBay
notes: Buyers request returns from Purchase history in My eBay. Sellers have 3 business days to respond. Most purchases covered by Money Back Guarantee. Can escalate to eBay after 3 days.

title: Request Total Amount
notes: Feature allowing buyers to request invoice from sellers for missing shipping costs or combined shipping discounts. Particularly useful for Motors category and Hawaii/Alaska exclusions.

title: Reserve Price
notes: Secret minimum bid price for auctions. Fee of $5 or 7.5% of reserve (whichever greater), up to $250 maximum. No obligation to sell if reserve not met. Can lower reserve during auction.

title: Reserve Price
notes: Secret minimum bid price for auctions. Fee of $5 or 7.5% of reserve (whichever greater), up to $250 maximum. No obligation to sell if reserve not met. Can lower reserve during auction.

title: eBay Services: Buying and Selling Tools: Dispute Resolution Overview
notes: Three-step Buyer Protection process for reporting problems. Buyers have 30 days from delivery to open case. Sellers have 3 business days to respond before escalation to eBay Customer Support.

title: Setting up your return policy | eBay
notes: Sellers can charge 0%, 10%, 15%, or 20% restocking fee deducted from refunds. Cannot be applied when item is 'not as described'. Managed returns default to 0% restocking fee.

title: Promoted Listings | Seller Center
notes: Two campaign strategies: general (pay on sale after click) and priority (pay per click with advanced targeting). Available to Above Standard and Top Rated sellers for fixed price listings.

title: Promoted Listings Advanced | Seller Center
notes: Cost-per-click advertising with priority access to ad placements. Now branded as the 'priority campaign strategy' under Promoted Listings. Sellers only pay for clicks with advanced targeting controls.
